sources.title: A Counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture

statement: The Alpöge map has generic degree 3, with affine fiber cardinality 3 off the cubic discriminant, 1 on the discriminant away from the triple-root curve, and 0 on the triple-root curve.
title: Generic degree and fiber stratification of the counterexample
